race.comment: Tough race to close the program. KENMARE BAY (2) gets the nod after an impressive return last start at the Kensington track, coming from worse than midfield to get the cash over a similar trip to this. Has a fine second-up record so expect him to hold that performance level. GRAPHIC SIGHT (7) has been freshened up since a tidy win over 1300m at Hawkesbury a month ago. Progressive three-year-old from the Gai and Adrian yard - must be respected. BAT OUT OF HELL (3) showed a glimpse of form at the Farm seven days ago when third-up from a spell. Has seven top three finishes from nine runs here at this distance. Easy to make a case. STOCKHOLM (5) is flying out Dubbo way and is not out of place in this line-up. SPIV (10) was back in winning ways last start at Newcastle. Gets in well again after the claim so another big run looks on the cards.
